heroHeadline: O3 Reportedly Named New CJNG Leader; 'El Pepe' and 'Memo' Arrested — Mexico Pursues Full Tapalpa Network
heroSubtitle: Juan Carlos Valencia González 'O3' — El Mencho's stepson and Grupo Élite commander — reportedly named new CJNG leader per anonymous cartel source, consistent with U.S. NCTC assessment. Two more significant arrests: 'El Pepe' (the logistics operator whose surveillance led to El Mencho's Tapalpa hideout) arrested March 16 in Tlajomulco de Zúñiga, Jalisco; 'Memo' (senior financial/logistics lieutenant) arrested March 17 in Mexico City. 4 CJNG members arrested in Tulum March 15. El Jardinero remains at large as rival power center. Day 25 since El Mencho's death.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Reuters, AP, CBS News, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: March 19, 2026.
